evals.prompt: Using the BrowserClaw browser, open https://news.ycombinator.com and give me the titles and links (URLs) of the top 5 stories on the front page. Return them as a numbered list.
evals.expected_output: A numbered list of the top 5 HN front-page story titles, each with its destination URL, obtained by driving the live browser (not by fetching HTML).

evals.prompt: There's a login practice page at https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login. Use the BrowserClaw browser to log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword! and then tell me the exact green confirmation message that appears after a successful login.
evals.expected_output: The confirmation flash message shown after logging in, which contains 'You logged into a secure area!', obtained by filling the form and submitting it in the live browser.

evals.prompt: Go to https://quotes.toscrape.com with the BrowserClaw browser and collect the first 10 quotes on the site along with each quote's author. Give me the result as a clean list of quote + author.
evals.expected_output: A list of 10 quotes each paired with the correct author, gathered from the live site (may require reading past the first page of results).
